issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringBattle' not 'EndOfBattle'. The power boost applies 'during this battle', which is an active duration while the battle is happening, not an end-of-turn or permanent effect.

Condition structure is unclear. The HasCardOnBoard type typically checks board presence but 'cost of 0' is a property filter that may need more specific specification. This is a minor issue if the engine supports property matching; otherwise it needs clarification.
